calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 22, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Norman Angell, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Les Fields. Petitioner, Les Fields was sworn and examined. After hearing evidence, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $35,145.18, Fees: $11,835.00, Costs: $935.44, Interest: $3,841.60 for a total judgment of $51,757.22. Order signed in open court.
